rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Order Compelling Response To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories Set No 1 And For Monetary Sanctions; Memo P/A; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 30, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT PEARL VANG's Motion To Set Aside Order Compelling Response To Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories Set No 1. Deny set aside as to all motions. Failed to sustain burden. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARKVIEW HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION A VS. SHEILA A MCINNIS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 30, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT SHEILA MCINNIS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Deny, opposing party established proper substitute service per CCP 415.20. See declaration of registered process server and Mr. Ur. Upadhye. Five days to plead from entry of order. = (501/REQ)
